title: HTTP Caching, Freshness, Validators, Vary, and Invalidation · Go Client Systems · Go Semantics Case: Freshness Age
summary: A metadata synchronizer uses ETags and shared gateways but has served a private stale representation after a Vary mistake. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go freshness age increment in a Go 1.26 net/http spec-aware cache decision notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compute freshness from explicit directives, dates, age, and response context rather than wall-clock intuition. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Distinguish private, shared, gateway, browser, and application caches plus who may reuse stored responses. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
